bride.name: Ẹniọláolúwa Ọmọlọlá
bride.body: An architect by day, a baker by Sunday, and a slow reader of long Russian novels. She finds Tiwa funnier than he is, which is the founding kindness of their union.

groom.name: Tiwaladé Ìfẹ́olúwa
groom.body: A surgeon, a tennis player, a fierce competitor over board games. He carried the ring around in his coat pocket for six months, for luck, he says.
